title: tf.nn.pool  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Performs an N-D pooling operation.
In the case thatdata_formatdoes not start with "NC", computes for
    0 <= b < batch_size,
    0 <= x[i] < output_spatial_shape[i],
    0 <= c < num_channels:
where the reduction function REDUCE depends on the value ofpooling_type,
and pad_before is defined based on the value ofpaddingas described in
the "returns" section oftf.nn.convolutionfor details.
The reduction never includes out-of-bounds positions.
